query:
-- Verificar distribuição de IDs para entender os lotes de inserção
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN id < 100 THEN 'IDs 1-99 (seed inicial)'
    WHEN id >= 100 AND id < 200 THEN 'IDs 100-199'
    WHEN id >= 200 AND id < 1000 THEN 'IDs 200-999'
    WHEN id >= 1000 AND id < 10000 THEN 'IDs 1000-9999'
    WHEN id >= 10000 AND id < 30000 THEN 'IDs 10000-29999'
    WHEN id >= 30000 AND id < 60000 THEN 'IDs 30000-59999'
    WHEN id >= 60000 AND id < 90000 THEN 'IDs 60000-89999'
    WHEN id >= 90000 THEN 'IDs 90000+ (último lote)'
  END as faixa_id,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  MIN(overall) as min_overall,
  MAX(overall) as max_overall
FROM players
GROUP BY faixa_id
ORDER BY MIN(id);

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN id < 100 THEN 'IDs 1-99 (seed inicial)'
    WHEN id >= 100 AND id < 200 THEN 'IDs 100-199'
    WHEN id >= 200 AND id < 1000 THEN 'IDs 200-999'
    WHEN id >= 1000 AND id < 10000 THEN 'IDs 1000-9999'
    WHEN id >= 10000 AND id < 30000 THEN 'IDs 10000-29999'
    WHEN id >= 30000 AND id < 60000 THEN 'IDs 30000-59999'
    WHEN id >= 60000 AND id < 90000 THEN 'IDs 60000-89999'
    WHEN id >= 90000 THEN 'IDs 90000+ (último lote)'
  END as faixa_id,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  MIN(overall) as min_overall,
  MAX(overall) as max_overall
FROM players
GROUP BY faixa_id
ORDER BY MIN(id);
